summary: Modern dark-theme, fully animated personal portfolio website for a Frontend Web Developer using React + Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion (optionally Three.js/GSAP), with premium futuristic UI and multiple animated sections.
architectural_notes: Tech stack: React + Vite, Tailwind CSS (dark theme), Framer Motion; optional Three.js/GSAP for advanced effects.
Design system: dark background (#0f0f0f/#0b0b0b), neon accents (cyan/purple/electric blue), glassmorphism, glow/hover effects, minimal futuristic UI.
Architecture goal: clean, reusable component structure with SEO-friendly setup and fully responsive layout.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Futuristic neon monogram logo mark, minimal geometric lines (logo-mark.dim_512x512.png)
- Dark cinematic hero background with subtle abstract neon gradients (hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)
- Subtle seamless monochrome noise/grain texture (noise-texture.dim_1024x1024.png)
- Stylized profile portrait illustration on dark background with neon rim light (profile-portrait.dim_800x800.png)
- Three project thumbnail illustrations with futuristic UI elements, dark theme, neon highlights (project-thumb-1.dim_1200x800.png)
- Three project thumbnail illustrations with futuristic UI elements, dark theme, neon highlights (project-thumb-2.dim_1200x800.png)
- Three project thumbnail illustrations with futuristic UI elements, dark theme, neon highlights (project-thumb-3.dim_1200x800.png)

existing_features.title: Implement a single-page personal portfolio website in a dark theme with neon accents and a minimal futuristic look: dark background (#0f0f0f / #0b0b0b), cyan/purple/electric-blue accents, glassmorphism cards, soft glow effects, and smooth hover interactions.
Set up Tailwind CSS configuration and global styles to support the dark theme, neon/glow tokens, glassmorphism utilities, custom dark-themed scrollbar, and a subtle noise/grain overlay texture.

Implement a global animation system using Framer Motion, including: smooth page/section transitions, reusable motion variants, scroll-based reveal animations (fade/slide/scale), and a page loader animation shown on initial load.
Create a responsive navbar that supports smooth scrolling to sections and hides/shows based on scroll direction (hide on scroll down, show on scroll up).

Build the Hero section with: large animated name text, role text with typing animation, and two prominent call-to-action buttons labeled “Hire Me” and “View Projects”, including cinematic on-load text animation.
Implement magnetic button interactions for primary CTAs and key interactive elements (subtle attraction to cursor), ensuring accessibility and mobile-safe behavior (disabled or adapted for touch).
Add a cursor follower animation that complements the neon/glow theme, with appropriate fallbacks on touch devices and without degrading performance.
Build the About section with an animated profile image, scroll-triggered text reveal, and a set of tech stack icons with hover animations and glow effects.
Build the Skills section featuring animated progress indicators (progress bars and/or circular loaders) and skill icons with glow hover effects.

Build the Projects section with fully animated project cards, hover tilt interaction, hover overlay showing “Live Demo” and “GitHub” links, and an animated filter control for categories (React / JS / HTML).
Build the Experience / Education section as an animated timeline with scroll-triggered reveals and a premium cinematic flow.

Build the Contact section with an animated contact form, input focus glow effects, and social media icons with hover animations. Form submission should be handled in-app (e.g., client-side validation + a local success state) without requiring third-party email integrations.
Build the Footer as a minimal dark footer with subtle animated text, matching the futuristic premium tone.
Add an animated gradient background (subtle, slow-moving) that complements the dark base and neon accents, and ensure it does not reduce content readability.
Add parallax scrolling effects for select hero/background elements to enhance cinematic storytelling, with conservative motion and accessibility-friendly behavior.

Ensure overall UX and quality: fully responsive layout (mobile/tablet/desktop), smooth scrolling, SEO-friendly basics (document title, meta description, semantic landmarks/heading structure), and a clean reusable component structure with clear comments.

Add required static image assets (generated) to the project under frontend/public/assets/generated and use them in the UI (hero/about/profile, project thumbnails, favicon-style mark, subtle noise texture). Do not serve these images from the backend.

new_feature_requests.summary: Set up React + Vite project with Tailwind CSS configured for dark theme and neon/glassmorphism styling tokens
Implement global animation system with Framer Motion (page transitions, scroll-based reveals, and reusable motion variants)
Build Hero section with animated name text, typing role text, and CTA buttons (Hire Me / View Projects)
Build About section with animated profile image, scroll text reveal, and tech stack icons with hover animations
Build Skills section with animated progress bars/circular loaders and glow-hover skill icons
Build Projects section with animated cards, hover overlay links (Live Demo/GitHub), and animated filters (React/JS/HTML)
Build Experience/Education section with animated timeline
Build Contact section with animated form, input focus glow, and social icons hover animations
Build Footer with minimal dark styling and subtle animated text

Add premium UX polish: responsive design, smooth scrolling, SEO basics, reusable component structure, navbar hide/show on scroll, cursor follower, magnetic buttons, hover-tilt cards, animated gradient background, custom scrollbar, loader, parallax, subtle noise/grain texture

projectName: Dark-theme animated frontend developer portfolio (React + Tailwind + Framer Motion)
